name: Tunnel Entrance (VC)
prompt:
Vietnam War era Viet Cong tunnel entrance. Hidden entrance to the extensive Cu Chi tunnel network.

Physical structure:
- Entrance frame: rectangular hole in ground, ~0.6m x 0.5m
  - Reinforced with bamboo/wood frame around edges
  - Frame sits flush with ground surface
- Trapdoor: wooden/bamboo hinged cover
  - Flat panel matching ground level
  - Show partially open (tilted up ~45 degrees on hinge)
  - Thin construction (~0.03m thick)
  - Leaf/dirt camouflage on top surface
- Tunnel shaft: dark hole visible below trapdoor
  - Rectangular shaft going down, ~1m deep before turning
  - Dark interior (dark brown/black materials)
- Camouflage: leaves, twigs, dirt around entrance
  - Small flat irregular pieces scattered on ground near entrance
  - Ground surface is jungle floor
- Ventilation: small bamboo tube poking up nearby (optional, ~0.02m diameter, ~0.3m tall)
  - Disguised as plant stem

Colors: Bamboo frame (0xb5a068), trapdoor wood (0x6B5B3F), leaf camouflage (0x3a5a1a), dirt (0x5a4a2a), dark tunnel interior (0x1a1510), jungle floor (0x4a5a2a)
Orientation: Flush with ground at Y=0, trapdoor opens toward +Z
Scale: Real-world meters (~0.6m x 0.5m entrance, ~1m deep shaft)
animations: Trapdoor: opens (rotates -90 degrees on X axis from closed) then closes over 3s cycle
